description: Sync news articles from NewsAPI.org into your destination. Supports topic-based filtering and incremental syncs.

fields.name: API_KEY
fields.label: API Key
fields.description: Your NewsAPI.org API key. Get one free at newsapi.org/register.

fields.name: pageSize
fields.label: Page Size
fields.description: Number of articles to fetch per page. Maximum is 100 (free tier capped at 100 total results).

fields.name: topic
fields.label: Topics
fields.description: JSON array of topics to search for, e.g. ["AI", "Finance"]. Each topic syncs into the ARTICLE table.
